should_fire.prompt: Count vehicles in these parking lot frames and build a model if needed.
I have images from a conveyor and want to detect damaged packages.
Read serial numbers from product labels in my inspection photos.
Track people through zones in warehouse camera footage.

should_not_fire.prompt: How much will managed deployment cost for five camera streams?
Compare deployment scale economics for self-hosting versus managed Roboflow.
Estimate annotation and training cost before we label another 2,000 images.
Show me a pure Roboflow platform how-to for exporting an already-working model.
